action.description:
Introduced by Senators Spreitzer, Smith, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Keyeski, Larson, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Roys, Wall, Wirch and Carpenter; 
cosponsored by Representatives Roe, Rivera-Wagner, Anderson, Arney, Bare, Billings, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Doyle, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Joers, Johnson, Madison, Mayadev, McCarville, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Sinicki, Sheehan, Spaude, Stubbs, Subeck, Taylor, Udell, Allen, DeSanto, Prado, Tenorio and Hong
